instruction: Review the following post-trade reflection from RUNECLAW's learning engine. Analyze the trade outcome, extract lessons learned, and provide actionable improvement suggestions.
input:
Symbol: BTC/USDT
Mode: paper
Expected: LONG signal at 60%
What Happened: REJECTED by risk engine: SYMBOL_EXPOSURE: BTC/USDT at 40.0% > 20.0% max
Confidence at Signal: 50%
output:
TRADE REFLECTION

Symbol: BTC/USDT
Expectation: LONG signal at 60%
Reality: REJECTED by risk engine: SYMBOL_EXPOSURE: BTC/USDT at 40.0% > 20.0% max

Lesson Learned:
Trade BTC/USDT LONG was rejected: SYMBOL_EXPOSURE: BTC/USDT at 40.0% > 20.0% max

Recommended Improvement:
Monitor price after rejection to validate risk engine accuracy

Classification: HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED

Analysis: The risk engine correctly blocked this trade due to excessive concentration in a single symbol. Even when the signal quality is acceptable, portfolio-level risk limits must be respected. Diversification across symbols reduces the impact of any single position going wrong.

Takeaway: Before generating a new trade idea, check existing exposure to the same symbol. If exposure is already at the limit, look for opportunities in other symbols instead.
